prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: website hero image for a clinic appointment system coursework prototype
Primary request: a polished modern healthcare appointment scheduling interface mockup shown on a laptop/tablet screen in a clean clinic reception environment
Constraints: no logos, no brand names, no medical diagnosis content, no real patient names, no watermark, no readable private data.
fallback_policy: If ENABLE_IMAGE_API_GENERATION is not 1, APIFREE_API_KEY is missing, or the API call fails, the notebook writes the embedded AI-generated PNG fallback.
safety_boundary: The image supports appointment administration only and must not include diagnosis, treatment advice, or real patient information.
